summary: No shared canonical was selected for this live PR inventory shard. Deterministic validation identified #89430 and #89906 as security-sensitive, so those exact hydrated refs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling with non-mutating route_security actions. The remaining hydrated refs are kept open conservatively because the job blocks merge, fix, raise-pr, and closeout work.

actions.reason: Route the exact hydrated issue to central OpenClaw security handling; do not close, comment, label, merge, or fix through ProjectClownfish.
